properties.name: budgetflow.enabled
properties.description: Enable BudgetFlow auto-configuration, including the latency budget aspect.

properties.name: budgetflow.default-budget
properties.description: Default request budget used by the latency budget aspect when an explicit annotation value is not provided.

properties.name: budgetflow.planner.profile
properties.description: Planner profile name (recommended property). Accepts balanced/default, continuity, or efficiency.

properties.name: budgetflow.planner.policy-profile
properties.description: Legacy planner profile property. Accepts balanced/default, continuity, or efficiency.

properties.name: budgetflow.runtime-signals.enabled
properties.description: Enable RuntimePressureSignals integration for supplying live executor, database, and downstream pressure.

properties.name: budgetflow.runtime-signals.include-default-provider
properties.description: Compose live runtime signals with the default budget-derived pressure provider instead of replacing it.
